non_release_findings.summary: translated/ stage retains stray Japanese (ア-エ) or Chinese (甲乙丙丁) choice markers in zh field for some choices, but output/page_NNN.{md,json} (release artifact) is fully normalized to A./B./C./D. on every spot-checked occurrence. Not release-impacting; intermediate stage only.
non_release_findings.verification_method: Read output/page_NNN.json for pages 388, 415, 446 and confirmed A./B./C./D. on all 12 questions / 48 choices.

ocr_observations: All 8 pages: OCR text aligns with downstream cleaned/translated content. No wrong-char / missing-text / table-flatten / answer-line-loss / Hangul / garbled-order / callout-misread detected. Tail '<!-- entity anchors: ... -->' literal placeholder shipped to output (not a Phase-1 regression — present across all pages).
translation_observations: Trilingual coherence good across exam (388/415/446) and section (376/399/420/476/537) pages. Answer indices match JP source for all 12 exam questions. Security-term definitions on p537 (PKI vs CA) correctly directed (no inversion). Glossary surfaces unique across pages reviewed. Minor: p446 EN year-edition format mixes '(FY2009)' and '(FY Heisei 31)' — cosmetic, no semantic loss.
convergence_signal: ZERO release-impacting defects on R14-3 sample of 8 fresh pages. Sample-level evidence consistent with prior R13 convergence claim.
verdict: PASS — no blocking issues; release v1.0.0 sample-track GREEN on this slice.
